title: Poteet
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Poteet |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]][[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Sir, I am a librarian. I am here to assist you in whichever way you deem felicitous."
"Sent by whom?"
"Sector Admiral Poteet, sir.|PRC-3 and Atour Riten converse|}} '''Poteet''' was a [[Sector admiral/Legends|Sector admiral]] who served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' he sent the [[Librarian droid/Legends|librarian droid]] [[P-RC3]] to the [[Death Star Library]] for duty, where the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] worked under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Atour Riten]]. ==Behind the scenes== Poteet was first mentioned in the [[2007]] novel [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] by [[Michael Reaves]] and [[Steve Perry]]. ==Appearances== *[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Poteet }} [[Category:Imperial Navy admirals of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]]
